SEARCH

Uses of Package
sc.fiji.snt.viewer

Packages that use sc.fiji.snt.viewer
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt
SNT core classes
sc.fiji.snt.analysis
Analysis of Trees.
sc.fiji.snt.annotation
Classes handling neuropil annotations and atlases metadata.
sc.fiji.snt.gui
Customizations and commands for SNT's GUI.
sc.fiji.snt.gui.cmds
Scijava-based GUIs for SNT built-in commands.
sc.fiji.snt.io
Classes for importing reconstructions into SNT.
sc.fiji.snt.viewer
Visualization of reconstructions
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.viewer used by sc.fiji.snt
    Class
    Description
    AbstractBigViewer
    Abstract base for SNT's BigDataViewer-family viewers (Bvv, Bdv, etc.).
    Viewer2D
    Class for rendering Trees as 2D plots that can be exported as SVG, PNG or PDF.
    Viewer3D
    Implements SNT's Reconstruction Viewer.
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.viewer used by sc.fiji.snt.analysis
    Class
    Description
    Annotation3D
    An Annotation3D is a triangulated surface or a cloud of points (scatter) rendered in Viewer3D that can be used to highlight nodes in a Tree or locations in a mesh.
    MultiViewer2D
    Class for rendering montages of Trees as 2D plots that can be exported as SVG, PNG or PDF.
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.viewer used by sc.fiji.snt.annotation
    Class
    Description
    OBJMesh
    An OBJMesh stores information about a Wavefront .obj mesh loaded into Viewer3D, with access points to its OBJFile and DrawableVBO
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.viewer used by sc.fiji.snt.gui
    Class
    Description
    Viewer3D
    Implements SNT's Reconstruction Viewer.
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.viewer used by sc.fiji.snt.gui.cmds
    Class
    Description
    AbstractBigViewer
    Abstract base for SNT's BigDataViewer-family viewers (Bvv, Bdv, etc.).
    Viewer3D
    Implements SNT's Reconstruction Viewer.
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.viewer used by sc.fiji.snt.io
    Class
    Description
    OBJMesh
    An OBJMesh stores information about a Wavefront .obj mesh loaded into Viewer3D, with access points to its OBJFile and DrawableVBO
  • Classes in sc.fiji.snt.viewer used by sc.fiji.snt.viewer
    Class
    Description
    AbstractBigViewer
    Abstract base for SNT's BigDataViewer-family viewers (Bvv, Bdv, etc.).
    AbstractBigViewer.AnnotationOverlay
    Common contract for all viewer annotation overlays.
    AbstractBigViewer.PathRenderingOptions
    Configuration options for path rendering.
    Annotation3D
    An Annotation3D is a triangulated surface or a cloud of points (scatter) rendered in Viewer3D that can be used to highlight nodes in a Tree or locations in a mesh.
    Bdv
    SNT's BigDataViewer-based 2D slice viewer.
    Bvv
    Support for Big Volume Viewer.
    Bvv.AnnotationOverlay
    Renders spherical annotations at SNTPoint world coordinates.
    Bvv.Keyframe
    A snapshot of the BVV viewer state at a particular moment, used as a keyframe for movie recording.
    BvvMultiSource
    A group of BvvSource objects that are treated as a logical unit: display properties (color, range, active state) and manual transforms applied to the leader source are propagated to all follower sources.
    OBJMesh
    An OBJMesh stores information about a Wavefront .obj mesh loaded into Viewer3D, with access points to its OBJFile and DrawableVBO
    Viewer2D
    Class for rendering Trees as 2D plots that can be exported as SVG, PNG or PDF.
    Viewer3D
    Implements SNT's Reconstruction Viewer.
    Viewer3D.AnimationMode
    Animation styles for live and recorded rotations.
    Viewer3D.ManagerPanel
     
    Viewer3D.RotationAxis
    Axes of rotation for animated sequences and live rotations.
    Viewer3D.ViewMode
    Presets of a scene's view point.
